data.title: Apple Partnership, AI Agents, And Major Infrastructure Investments: OpenAI Executives Outline Strategy To Attract 1B Users By 2025
data.description: OpenAI aims to reach 1 billion users by 2025 through innovative AI products, a partnership with Apple, and extensive infrastructure investments, while positioning itself as a U.S.-led AI leader in a competitive global landscape.

data.title: Dogecoin Bounces 9% After Bernie Sanders' Views Align With Elon Musk's 'DOGE' Department
data.description: Popular dog-themed cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) rallied sharply Sunday after Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) implicitly supported Elon Musk's upcoming Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE.

data.title: How To Bridge The Financial Product Knowledge Gap, Drive Business
data.description: Survey shows 60% adults would buy more financial products if they understood them better.

data.title: Harry Potter's Ron Weasley Cursed With $2.3M Tax Bill After Losing Lawsuit
data.description: Rupert Grint, famed for his portrayal of Ron Weasley in the "Harry Potter" film series, has been slapped with a $2.3 million tax bill following a legal dispute with British tax authorities.

data.title: Bernie Sanders: 'Elon Musk Is Right' On Wasteful Defense Spending
data.description: On Sunday, Dec. 1, 2024, Bernie Sanders echoed Elon Musk's concerns about Pentagon waste, citing unpassed audits and an $886 billion defense budget as areas needing urgent reform.
